patterns_recognized: Bullpen-carry thesis validated 5/5 across large-delta (f5_full_delta ≥ 0.12) + negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap games in the last 14 days (5/26 NYY@KC 15-1, 5/28 MIN@CHW 6-2, 5/29 BOS@CLE 4-3, 5/29 MIL@HOU 5-4, 5/29 PHI@LAD 4-2); treat this pattern as a directional amplifier, not a DOWNGRADE trigger.

D-grade dual-signal-against (SP xERA AND PQI both opposing the model pick) is directionally unreliable at ~60% in recent archive; do not assert certainty of wrong direction, but apply one tier of skepticism on near-coin-flip picks in this bucket.
PLATINUM historical hit rate ~43%; avoid staking PLATINUM picks whose sole primary driver is team_quality_modifier; require at least two F-signals or one F-signal plus PQI corroboration.

COL home picks at Coors Field exhibit elevated SP xERA signal variance due to altitude; apply half-confidence on SP edge signals at COL home, but confirmed by run-scoring patterns in both directions (D-grade COL wins AND A-grade COL edges).

Systemic parse error from prior Brain runs (misidentifying Stage 1/2 disagreement away-team picks) is verified-fixed for this run: pick column read directly from CSV; full_prob sign confirms pick direction on every row.

TOR @ BAL.reasoning: BAL picked at 54.1% with D-grade (-1): SP edge 1.19 xERA AGAINST BAL (Bradish vs Miles) and PQI Δ=-14.1 against BAL late-game profile. Negative edge (-0.73pp) triggers HARD CAP 1, zeroing stake correctly. BAL bullpen has a mild advantage (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0117) but cannot overcome the SP and PQI deficit. F3_swing_take_gap=4190.7 provides a directional lean for BAL that keeps this from being a fade, but D-grade with dual opposing signals warrants minimal directional confidence. SKIP enforced.

SD @ WSH.reasoning: SD picked at 54.3% away with pre-cap B+ (score=3): Canning's xERA edge (+2.00 over Littell, small sample) and PQI Δ=-27.0 both support SD's direction. HARD CAP 1 (-2.43pp negative edge) fired first, then HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.522 in bottom bucket) correctly zeroed stake. Archive bottom-bucket non-CONFIRM hits only 31.2%. SD directional conviction is moderate—negative edge confirms market already priced SD's advantage. SKIP is correct.

MIN @ PIT.reasoning: PIT picked at 56.1% home with C-grade (score=0): SP edge 0.40 xERA AGAINST PIT (Ashcraft vs Matthews, small sample min_pa=73) and PQI Δ=-3.1 against PIT both marginally oppose. Overall near-coin-flip with no convincing signal stack for staking. SKIP enforced.

BOS @ CLE.reasoning: CLE D-grade (-2) with NO F-signals firing, Suarez holding a 0.88 xERA edge over Bibee, PQI Δ=-12.9 against CLE late-game, and hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0104 (CLE pen slightly worse). The f5_full_delta=0.1886 bullpen-carry thesis is undermined by CLE's worse high-leverage pen. Note Bibee underperformed catastrophically in the 5/25 WSH@CLE PLATINUM blowout (10-2); double-flag on Bibee in this structural role. SKIP is correct; CLE direction is weak.

LAA @ TB.reasoning: TB picked at 65.0% home: McClanahan holds F1_xera_gap=1.96 (thin sample but meaningful) over Kochanowicz, PQI Δ=+24.7 strongly confirms TB late-game profile, pre-cap score=4 (A-). HARD CAP 1 (-1.77pp) correctly prevents stake at inferior model odds—market already priced TB well. TB record 35-20 vs LAA 23-36 adds strong qualitative support. acute_roster flag noted but doesn't override McClanahan's structural advantage. Directional confidence in TB is solid; SKIP enforced on negative edge.

ATL @ CIN.reasoning: ATL picked at 56.1% away (full_prob=0.4387 confirms away pick): Strider's 3.60 xERA edge over Lodolo (small sample, min_pa=92) and PQI Δ=-48.2 both strongly support ATL direction. Pre-cap score=3 (B+) collapsed via HARD CAP 1 (-1.81pp) and HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.530). ATL's 40-19 record adds qualitative conviction. SKIP correct; directional lean to ATL is moderate. Strider small-sample caveat is a 2026 PA count artifact—his established quality is well-documented.

MIA @ NYM.reasoning: MIA D-grade (-3) with all signals opposing: McLean holds 0.65 xERA edge over Junk, PQI Δ=+9.3 favors NYM, fair_prob=0.380 (market gives MIA only 38.0% vs model's 52.5%), and f5_full_delta=0.259 (Stage 1 gives NYM 73.4%). The model's barely-above-50% Stage 2 MIA pick is a thin signal against overwhelming market and structural evidence favoring NYM. MIA record 26-33 vs NYM 25-33 is essentially equivalent. SKIP is absolutely correct; MIA direction should be treated as unreliable.

DET @ CHW.reasoning: CHW picked at 56.5% home: F3_swing_take_gap=945.7 (modest signal) provides directional support; PQI Δ=-4.5 mildly opposes. Edge +0.98pp is barely positive but outside [4,15]pp band (stake_mult=0); HARD CAP 10 fires on pick_prob=0.533. CHW record 31-27 vs DET 22-37 is a meaningful qualitative gap. No hard caps fired on the score—this is purely a staking band and bottom-bucket enforcement. Directional lean to CHW is mild.

MIL @ HOU.reasoning: HOU D-grade (-3) is a nearly pure numerical artifact: full_prob=0.5009 barely crosses 0.5 for HOU while every other signal points to MIL. Misiorowski (MIL) holds a 3.53 xERA edge, PQI Δ=-53.1 is catastrophically against HOU, fair_prob=0.332 (market gives HOU only 33.2%), f5_full_delta=0.293 with Stage 1 giving MIL 79.3%, and MIL is 34-21 vs HOU 27-33. The model's HOU pick is directionally unreliable—if any direction applied, it would be MIL. DOWNGRADE to reflect near-zero HOU conviction.

KC @ TEX.reasoning: KC picked at 50.2% away (full_prob=0.4982 confirms away pick): pre-cap score=5 (A) with F1*+F3 and Wacha's 0.70 xERA edge over Leiter, but HARD CAP 7 (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0019, KC pen slightly worse) demoted score 5→1, then HARD CAP 10 (pick_prob=0.522) zeroed stake. Stake zeroed solely because edge=15.22pp is 0.22pp above the [4,15]pp staking ceiling—no hard cap fired on the score. This is a clean directional CONFIRM. Coors Field altitude noted from 5/29 archive as an amplifier of run-scoring volatility; today the park context is additive (Gordon's edge is structurally sound here, not fighting altitude). Both teams 22-36/22-37; pure SP quality differential drives the call.

NYY @ OAK.reasoning: Strongest pick on slate. NYY score=9 (A): F1*+F2+F5_bullpen_gap triple-signal stack, Warren's 0.73 xERA edge over Lopez, PQI Δ=-17.6, edge +8.85pp in staking band, no hard cap fired. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0145 (NYY pen better) + f5_full_delta=0.1941 is the validated bullpen-carry pattern—confirmed 5/5 in the last 14 days (including 5/29 NYY@OAK 8-2, 5/26 NYY@KC 15-1). F1* asterisk mitigated by F2 and F5 presence (HARD CAP 5 satisfied). NYY 35-23 vs OAK 28-30. PLATINUM hit-rate caveat noted; multi-signal stack reduces concern.

ARI @ SEA.reasoning: ARI C-grade (score=0) with massive structural opposition: Miller holds 6.13 xERA edge over Kelly (small sample, min_pa=96), PQI Δ=+60.6 against ARI, fair_prob=0.409 (<0.42 SKIP threshold), HARD CAP 10 fires. This directly mirrors 5/29 ARI@SEA D-grade loss (SEA won 7-6; Kirby's xERA edge 1.52 materialized). Today Miller's advantage is even larger (6.13 vs 1.52). ARI's directional conviction is very low—DOWNGRADE to reflect SEA's structural advantage that the model's F3+F5 signals cannot offset.

MLB statsapi confirms Wicks and Matthew Liberatore (STL home) as the SPs. Protocol is correct—no directional call is possible without a scored SP quality estimate for Wicks. Archive validates PENDING_SP_DATA enforcement across multiple thin-SP games (5/29 MIN@PIT, 5/29 TOR@BAL, 5/29 DET@CHW all correctly blocked). No stake, no direction.
